customAttributes.description:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Whenever a creature you control with deathtouch deals combat damage to a player, that player gets two poison counters. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/15/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Come, Koma, and reclaim what you lost! Or does the great serpent fear a rematch?"
